reason: Tool code contains an unusually large number of numeric literals and looks overfit

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Direct multiple-choice visual attribute lookup where the answer depends on identifying the color of a specific localized object in the image.
supported_variations: Questions asking for the color of a named object or accessory
Multiple-choice direct attribute questions where the target object is visually present but small or localized
unsupported_variations: Questions requiring object counting, relational reasoning, or reading embedded text rather than identifying a localized color attribute
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode any specific object category such as handbag
Do not assume fixed image regions or one-off coordinates for the target object
Do not hardcode answer priors like common handbag colors or repeated choice ordering
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: Failures are concentrated on a stable, toolable subpattern: localized object color identification in direct lookup questions, so a reusable color-focused visual primitive plus selection skill should transfer across similar cases.

revision_brief.reason: Tool code contains an unusually large number of numeric literals and looks overfit
evidence: Static inspection found image- or case-anchored logic in the tool proposal.
rewrite_requirements: Replace case-specific thresholds or coordinates with relative or image-derived logic.
State applicability conditions for a family-level visual pattern.
